ORDER BY dim_district.district_name ASC;

question: Chittoor district mein sthit sub-district names aur ULB/RLB village names dikhaiye, lekin un sub-districts ko chhodkar jo Prakasam district mein bhi paaye jaate hain. Inhe sub-district aur village name ke hisaab se group karein aur sub-district ke naam se alphabetical order mein arrange karein.
gold_sql: SELECT T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T2.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_LOCATION AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.DISTRICT_NAME = 'Chittoor' AND T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME NOT IN (SELECT T4.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T3 JOIN DIM_LOCATION AS T4 ON T3.DISTRICT_ID = T4.DISTRICT_ID WHERE T3.DISTRICT_NAME = 'Prakasam') GROUP BY T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T2.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME ORDER BY T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ASC
predicted_sql:
SELECT l.sub_district_name, l.ulb_rlb_village_name
FROM dim_location l
JOIN dim_district d ON l.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE d.district_name ILIKE 'Chittoor'
  AND l.sub_district_name NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT l2.sub_district_name
    FROM dim_location l2
    JOIN dim_district d2 ON l2.district_id = d2.district_id
    WHERE d2.district_name ILIKE 'Prakasam'
  )
GROUP BY l.sub_district_name, l.ulb_rlb_village_name
ORDER BY l.sub_district_name;
raw_output:
SELECT l.sub_district_name, l.ulb_rlb_village_name
FROM dim_location l
JOIN dim_district d ON l.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE d.district_name ILIKE 'Chittoor'
  AND l.sub_district_name NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT l2.sub_district_name
    FROM dim_location l2
    JOIN dim_district d2 ON l2.district_id = d2.district_id
    WHERE d2.district_name ILIKE 'Prakasam'
  )
GROUP BY l.sub_district_name, l.ulb_rlb_village_name
ORDER BY l.sub_district_name;

question: Sub-district ke naam list karo, alphabetically order mein, jismein kam se kam ek sector 'Rural' category ka ho aur kam se kam ek sector 'Urban' category ka ho.

predicted_sql:

FROM dim_location dl
JOIN fact_establishment_totals fet ON dl.location_id = fet.location_id
JOIN dim_sector_category dsc ON fet.sector_id = dsc.sector_id
WHERE dsc.sector_category ILIKE 'Rural'
INTERSECT
SELECT DISTINCT dl.sub_district_name
FROM dim_location dl
JOIN fact_establishment_totals fet ON dl.location_id = fet.location_id
JOIN dim_sector_category dsc ON fet.sector_id = dsc.sector_id
WHERE dsc.sector_category ILIKE 'Urban'
ORDER BY sub_district_name;
raw_output:
SELECT DISTINCT dl.sub_district_name
FROM dim_location dl
JOIN fact_establishment_totals fet ON dl.location_id = fet.location_id
JOIN dim_sector_category dsc ON fet.sector_id = dsc.sector_id
WHERE dsc.sector_category ILIKE 'Rural'
INTERSECT
SELECT DISTINCT dl.sub_district_name
FROM dim_location dl
JOIN fact_establishment_totals fet ON dl.location_id = fet.location_id
JOIN dim_sector_category dsc ON fet.sector_id = dsc.sector_id
WHERE dsc.sector_category ILIKE 'Urban'

gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_ESTABLISHMENT_TOTALS AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID JOIN FACT_PRIMARY_SECTOR AS T3 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T3.LOCATION_ID AND T2.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T4 ON T2.TIME_ID = T4.TIME_ID WHERE T3.EST_FISHING_AQUACULTURE >= 0.000 AND T2.EST_RESIDENTIAL_COMMERCIAL >= 0.000 AND T4.CENSUS_YEAR = '2013' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME HAVING COUNT(T2.FACT_ESTABLISHMENT_TOTALS_ID) >= 1 ORDER BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ASC
predicted_sql:
SELECT dim_location.sub_district_name, dim_location.ulb_rlb_village_name
FROM dim_location
INNER JOIN fact_primary_sector ON dim_location.location_id = fact_primary_sector.location_id
INNER JOIN fact_establishment_totals ON fact_primary_sector.location_id = fact_establishment_totals.location_id AND fact_primary_sector.time_id = fact_establishment_totals.time_id AND fact_primary_sector.sector_id = fact_establishment_totals.sector_id
INNER JOIN dim_time ON fact_primary_sector.time_id = dim_time.time_id
WHERE dim_time.census_year = 2013
GROUP BY dim_location.location_id, dim_location.sub_district_name, dim_location.ulb_rlb_village_name
HAVING SUM(fact_primary_sector.est_fishing_aquaculture) >= 0 AND SUM(fact_establishment_totals.est_residential_commercial) >= 0
ORDER BY dim_location.sub_district_name;
raw_output:
SELECT dim_location.sub_district_name, dim_location.ulb_rlb_village_name
FROM dim_location
INNER JOIN fact_primary_sector ON dim_location.location_id = fact_primary_sector.location_id
INNER JOIN fact_establishment_totals ON fact_primary_sector.location_id = fact_establishment_totals.location_id AND fact_primary_sector.time_id = fact_establishment_totals.time_id AND fact_primary_sector.sector_id = fact_establishment_totals.sector_id
INNER JOIN dim_time ON fact_primary_sector.time_id = dim_time.time_id
WHERE dim_time.census_year = 2013
GROUP BY dim_location.location_id, dim_location.sub_district_name, dim_location.ulb_rlb_village_name
HAVING SUM(fact_primary_sector.est_fishing_aquaculture) >= 0 AND SUM(fact_establishment_totals.est_residential_commercial) >= 0
ORDER BY dim_location.sub_district_name;

question: Assam, Andhra Pradesh, ya Bihar states mein jo locations hain, unke liye state name, district name, aur ULB/RLB village name dikha do. Prakasam district ko exclude kar do. State, district, aur village name ke hisaab se group karo, aur phir village aur district ke alphabetical order mein arrange karo.
gold_sql: SELECT T3.STATE_NAME, T2.DISTRICT_NAME, T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID INNER JOIN DIM_STATE AS T3 ON T2.STATE_ID = T3.STATE_ID WHERE T3.STATE_NAME IN ('Assam', 'Andhra Pradesh', 'Bihar') AND T2.DISTRICT_NAME NOT IN ('Prakasam') GROUP BY T3.STATE_NAME, T2.DISTRICT_NAME, T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME ORDER BY T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME ASC, T2.DISTRICT_NAME ASC
predicted_sql:
SELECT dim_state.state_name, dim_district.district_name, dim_location.ulb_rlb_village_name
FROM dim_location
JOIN dim_district ON dim_location.district_id = dim_district.district_id
JOIN dim_state ON dim_district.state_id = dim_state.state_id
WHERE dim_state.state_name IN ('Assam', 'Andhra Pradesh', 'Bihar')
  AND dim_district.district_name != 'Prakasam'
GROUP BY dim_state.state_name, dim_district.district_name, dim_location.ulb_rlb_village_name
ORDER BY dim_location.ulb_rlb_village_name, dim_district.district_name;
raw_output:
SELECT dim_state.state_name, dim_district.district_name, dim_location.ulb_rlb_village_name
FROM dim_location
JOIN dim_district ON dim_location.district_id = dim_district.district_id
JOIN dim_state ON dim_district.state_id = dim_state.state_id
WHERE dim_state.state_name IN ('Assam', 'Andhra Pradesh', 'Bihar')
  AND dim_district.district_name != 'Prakasam'
GROUP BY dim_state.state_name, dim_district.district_name, dim_location.ulb_rlb_village_name
ORDER BY dim_location.ulb_rlb_village_name, dim_district.district_name;
